creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
Hello Tobias,

Thanks for the patch. Looks fine to me.

Embarrassingly enough, I actually started working on updating the port when the new version was released, but ran into some build issues at the time  and never got around to finishing the work after getting sidetracked by other things. Either way, I do like your patch better than my old stuff.

Best wishes,
Martin
